customizations_supported.description: A list of customizations that the model supports, such as fine-tuning or model-specific settings.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Bedrock foundation model.

inference_types_supported.description: The different types of inference operations that the model can perform.

input_modalities.description: The various input formats or types that the model can accept for processing.

model_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the model.

model_name.description: The name of the Bedrock foundation model.

output_modalities.description: The different output formats or types that the model can produce.

provider_name.description: The name of the provider offering the foundation model.

response_streaming_supported.description: Indicates whether the model supports streaming responses for real-time processing.
